title: Roasted Banana Split
summary: This healthy version of a childhood classic will satisfy all of your sweet-tooth cravings in a super healthy way. It's also a great use for overripe bananas.

ingredients.label: 50g Pecans (Or Any Other Nuts Or Seeds)
ingredients.name: Pecans

ingredients.label: 1-2 Tbsp Date syrup (Or Maple Syrup/ Agave)
ingredients.name: Date Syrup

method.description: Pierce the bananas all over with a fork and place on a lined baking tray. Roast for 20 mins, flip and roast for another 10 mins. They should be jet black all over.
Meanwhile, roast the pecans for 5-6 mins, tossing once. Roughly chop.
To prepare the bananas, Slice them down the middle, lengthwise. I like to mash them slightly with a fork at this point, to get maximum surface area for the toppings.
Layer up the tahini, syrup, nuts, and yoghurt, Chop the chocolate or use a speed peeler to carve it into thin shavings over the bananas.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
